description: A furniture item the user owns in the atrium hangout. One record per item (rkey=tid); the inventory is the collection of records under this collection. Placement in a specific room is a separate concern (handled by a per-room layout record in a future revision).

kind.description: Which procedural shape the renderer composes for this item. Clients must ignore items whose kind they don't recognise (forward compatibility for future kinds).

color.description: Lowercase #rrggbb hex. Top-face color; the renderer derives the side-face shades.

name.description: Optional human label for the item — shown in the inventory UI.
